positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a majestic forest creature, perhaps a gentle griffin or a fantastical owl, sitting amidst bioluminescent flora. The scene should feature deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and accents of glowing gold and magenta. The composition must be centralized and easily readable as a single motif, rendered with clean lines, strong silhouette contrast, and intricate detailing suitable for a wearable patch or T-shirt print. Use a high-contrast, graphic-novel aesthetic mixed with Art Nouveau elegance. Excellent depth of field, volumetric lighting emphasizing the creature and glowing elements. Studio quality print art.
negative: blurry, lowres, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poorly rendered hands
